error.insufficient_header_coefficients: xexlẽdzesi siwo woateŋu azã si mesɔ gbɔ na tanya ƒe tsɔtsɔ de eme o: hiã bit 32, %d xexlẽdzesi siwo woateŋu azã koe wokpɔ

error.invalid_k_parameter: ele be k parameter nanɔ 1 kple 8 dome

error.nil_random_source: random source mateŋu anye nil o: zã InitializePRNG(password) alo na RandomSource si woƒã do ŋgɔ
